title: U.S. Supremes to hear transgender athlete case that could impact Alaska sports
summary: On Jan. 13, the U.S. Supreme Court is set to hear oral arguments in a pair of cases that could determine whether Alaska and other states are allowed to protect women’s sports from male athletes who claim to identify as females. The cases, Little v. Hecox and West Virginia v. B.P.J., deal with gender...
